concerns.text: T011 specifies fetching GRACE-FO data from 'CSR/JPL official repository' without providing the exact canonical URL. Implementer cannot execute without knowing the precise download endpoint (e.g., https://grace.jpl.nasa.gov/data/get-data/).

T012 provides a metadata landing page URL (https://www.ncei.noaa.gov/access/metadata/landing-page/bin/iso?id=gov.noaa.ncdc:C00516) rather than the actual data download endpoint. Implementer cannot fetch data from a metadata page.
T001 'Create project structure per implementation plan' is too coarse - does not specify exact directory layout. Atomizer will split this into concrete directory creation tasks.
T003 'Configure linting and formatting tools' lacks specific config file names (e.g., .flake8, pyproject.toml). Needs concrete deliverable specification.
T011-T016 all target the same file (code/01_data_ingestion.py) with different features. These should be consolidated into fewer tasks or split by function for better granularity.
T017-T019 all target code/02_preprocessing.py. Consolidate into single preprocessing task or split by distinct preprocessing step with separate output files.
T023-T034 all target code/03_correlation_analysis.py. This is too coarse - atomizer will split into smaller implementation units.
T037-T039 all target code/04_visualization.py. Consolidate or split by distinct plot type with separate output file paths.
T041-T044 all target code/05_sensitivity_report.py. Consolidate into single sensitivity analysis task.
T040 'descriptive filenames' is vague - specify exact naming convention (e.g., timeseries_overlay.png, scatter_regression.png).
T045 is a negative verification task (ensure NO causal language). Needs positive test criteria (e.g., 'Create test that asserts absence of keywords in output files').
T049 'README.md with quickstart instructions' lacks concrete deliverable - specify required sections (installation, data sources, run commands).
T056 'Run quickstart.md validation' is vague - specify exact validation command or test to execute.
